full_description: Focus Timer is a productivity app that helps users stay focused and on track. It uses the Pomodoro Technique to boost productivity and reduce distractions. With Focus Timer, you can work in focused 25-minute increments, followed by a 5-minute break. After four cycles, you'll receive a longer break of 15-30 minutes. This technique can help you stay motivated, avoid burnout, and maintain a sustainable work pace. Key features include: customizable work and break intervals, timer notifications, and statistics to track your progress. Download Focus Timer today and start achieving your goals.
